sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الرِّجَالُ فِي الْخَلِيجِ الثَّوْبَ الْأَبْيَضَ الطَّوِيلَ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ الرَّسْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Muškarci u Zaljevu nose dugu bijelu haljinu na formalnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Men in the Gulf wear the long white robe on formal occasions.
